title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Extension Lens: Tool Granularity
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext tool granularity increment in an efficient tool API and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.
Use protocol inspection and client logs to diagnose negotiation and transport failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
